Class RunningBack

java.lang.Object
RunningBack
All Implemented Interfaces:
FootballPlayer
public class RunningBack extends Object implements FootballPlayer

    • RunningBack

      public RunningBack()
      default constructor

    • RunningBack

      public RunningBack(String name, String nflTeam, int noGamesPlayed, int passAttempts_qb, int totalYard_qb, int touchDowns)
      Parameterized constructor.
      Parameters:
      name - player name
      nflTeam - NFL team
      noGamesPlayed - number of games played
      passAttempts_qb - rushing attempts
      touchDowns - total touchdowns
      totalYards - total rushing yards
